author: doll-agent
content: README updates accompanying the 0.3.0 release: refreshed all 0.2.x perf claims (23/55) to the current 40/55 scorecard, added GEMM kernel section to ferray-linalg, complex transcendentals + libm trig path to ferray-ufunc, pairwise-base-4096 perf table to ferray-stats, full crate surface listings for ferray-ma (reductions/manipulation/mask-ops/linalg-set-corr/fill-value/class-helpers), ferray-numpy-interop (f16/bf16/complex/null/RecordBatch/DynArray), ferray-random (MT19937/PCG64DXSM/SFC64/SeedSequence/zipf/noncentral_*), ferray-polynomial (multivariate, Gauss quadrature, polyfromroots, mulx, basis-conversion), ferray-io (DataSource, format helpers, fromregex), ferray-strings (classification, codecs, formatting). Cargo features section added to main README listing avx512 / avxvnni / bf16 / f16 / openblas with their MSRV implications.
